name: WildShore Collective
about: Wildshore Collective is a private, premium performance center in Westlake Village designed for intentional golf and fitness training. The venue offers a distraction-free environment with private coaching, TrackMan iO practice, and golf-specific strength, mobility, and conditioning programs. It is tailored for golfers seeking structured practice, coaching support, and consistent training without crowds or noise. Memberships provide access to TrackMan hours, full gym use, and coaching in one private environment, while also offering public bookings for private simulator sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Fully private TrackMan iO simulator experience
No crowds or distractions for focused training
Combine golf practice with fitness training in one location
Flexible booking options including early bird and happy hour rates
Access to personalized 1:1 golf coaching using TrackMan data

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Food) - vending machine available on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar and high-speed imaging technology for elite-level accuracy

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf equipment for sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, Wildshore Collective is BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) and BYOF (Bring Your Own Food). A vending machine is also available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Play time depends on your pace and the virtual course selected, but private bay sessions allow you to practice or play at your own speed.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Wildshore Collective offers a fully private, kid-friendly TrackMan experience designed for family sessions and small groups.
